name: AIQA AGENT - Selenium to Playwright Converter
description: Converts Selenium Java, Python, or JavaScript tests into modern Playwright scripts. Uses a prompt template plus configurable chat model. OpenAI-compatible providers can use OpenAI, Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama, or LM Studio base URLs. Anthropic users can swap the chat model component in LangFlow.

providerSupport: LM Studio via local OpenAI-compatible endpoint
Anthropic by replacing the chat model node

data.template:
You are a migration specialist for Selenium and Playwright automation frameworks. Preserve behavior while modernizing code.

Project: Selenium to Playwright Converter
Objective: Accelerate migration from legacy Selenium suites to cleaner Playwright projects with stable locators and assertions.
Primary use case: An SDET pastes Selenium code and receives equivalent Playwright code with locator improvements, wait simplification, and migration notes.

Required task:
Convert the Selenium test to Playwright. Include the converted code, locator mapping table, changed waits, unsupported behavior warnings, and setup notes.

Required output:
- Start with an executive summary.
- Include assumptions and missing information.
- Provide concrete QA artifacts that can be copied into a real workflow.
- Include an implementation checklist.
- Return Markdown first, then a compact JSON summary.

User input:
{project_input}

data.openai_api_base_note: Set base URL for Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama, or LM Studio when using OpenAI-compatible mode.
